AxEnumValue.Name: Method1
AxEnumValue.Label: (Gross MT- Dockage MT- Split MT) * Levy Rate

AxEnumValue.Name: Method2
AxEnumValue.Label: ((Gross Weight * Price)- (Dockage Weight* Price)) * Levy percentage

AxEnumValue.Name: Method3
AxEnumValue.Label: ((Gross Weight * Price)- (Dockage Weight* Price)- (Split Weight* Price)) * Levy percentage
